member.name: T:JOSYN.Commons.Log.ILocalLog
member.summary: Contract definition for the process-local file logger. Writes entries to <LogDirectory>\<yyyy-MM-dd>.log. Overloads with a causer parameter write to a subdirectory of the same name.

member.name: P:JOSYN.Commons.Log.ILocalLog.LogDirectory
member.summary: Root path for all log files of this process. Must be set before the first log call if a different storage location is desired.

member.name: P:JOSYN.Commons.Log.ILocalLog.EnableConsoleOutput
member.summary: Controls whether log entries are additionally written to the console.

member.name: M:JOSYN.Commons.Log.ILocalLog.WriteError(JOSYN.Foundation.ResultPattern.Result)
member.summary: Writes an error entry from a .

member.name: M:JOSYN.Commons.Log.ILocalLog.WriteError(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Writes an error entry to the subdirectory of the specified causer.

member.name: M:JOSYN.Commons.Log.ILocalLog.WriteError(System.String,JOSYN.Foundation.ResultPattern.Result)
member.summary: Writes an error entry from a to the subdirectory of the specified causer.

member.name: M:JOSYN.Commons.Log.ILocalLog.WriteInfo(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Writes an info entry to the subdirectory of the specified causer.
